title: Nikolaos #3532
definition:
Nicolas = "victor of the people"

 1) was a proselyte of Antioch and one of the seven deacons of the
    church at Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nicolas = "victor of the people"

 1) was a proselyte of Antioch and one of the seven deacons of the
    church at Jerusalem

    NASB:  Nicolaus, a Chr., prob. not connected with the sect bearing the same name:
